title: Bell Highlights
body:
![Nowhere to Hide!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36175ce7e4e652025f8fe0ba7cc59daa4ae49540_0.webp)

# **IMPORTANT** - I (AverageTaTeMan) only share my content on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/averagetateman/), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AverageTaTeMan), and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/averagetateman/projects) - If you see this project on any other site, IT IS NOT ME AND SHOULD NOT BE TRUSTED!

This data pack makes it so that ringing a bell while certain blocks are above it or holding specific items will cause it to highlight different mobs whenever it is rung. Useful for when you're searching for unlit caves, or trying to find that nearby zombie that keeps annoying you with its growls..


<details>
<summary>Highlight Details:</summary>
By default, the highlight is triggered when a valid mob for the item/block is detected within 32 blocks, causing all valid mobs within 48 blocks to be highlighted.  These distances can be doubled by holding a Nether Star in the offhand.

**Blocks:**
- Creeper Head - Creeper
- Zombie Head - Zombie, Zombie Villager, Husk, Drowned
- Skeleton Skull - Skeleton, Stray, Bogged, Parched
- Wither Skeleton Skull - Wither Skeleton
- Piglin Head (Post 1.20)/Gold Block (Pre 1.20) - Piglin, Piglin Brute, Zombified Piglin
- Dragon Head - Nothing (Ender Dragon Unaffected)
- Player Head - Player, Mannequin
- Emerald Block - Villager, Wandering Trader, Zombie Villager
- Cobweb - Spider, Cave Spider
- Turtle Egg - Turtle
- Sniffer Egg - Sniffer
- Slime Block - Slime
- Sculk Shrieker - Warden
- Creaking Heart - Creaking
- Dried Ghast - Ghast, Happy Ghast
- Jukebox (with Music Disc inside) - Allay, Vex, Parrot
- Ender Chest - Enderman, Blaze
- Conduit - Guardian, Elder Guardian
- Beacon (Toggles Glowing Rather Than Giving Temporary Status Effect) - Wither
- Dragon Egg - Endermite
- Bee Nest/Bee Hive (with Bees inside) - Bee
- Copper Golem Statues - Copper Golem
- Shulker Boxes - Shulker
- Carved Pumpkin/Jack o'Lantern - Snow Golem, Iron Golem, Copper Golem
- Infested Blocks - Silverfish
- Froglights - Frog, Magma Cube

**Items:**
- Bone - Wolf, Skeleton Horse
- Red Mushroom - Zombie Horse
- Cactus - Camel
- Rabbit Foot - Camel Husk
- Snowball - Snow Golem, Happy Ghast
- Iron Ingot - Iron Golem
- Gold Ingot - Piglin
- Emerald - Villager, Wandering Trader, Zombie Villager
- Saddle - Horse, Donkey, Mule, Zombie Horse, Skeleton Horse, Camel, Camel Husk, Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus, Pig, Strider
- Shears - Sheep, Mooshroom, Snow Golem, Bogged
- Bucket - Cow, Mooshroom, Goat, Sulfur Cube
- Water Bucket - Cod, Salmon, Pufferfish, Tropical Fish, Axolotl, Tadpole
- Bowl - Mooshroom
- Goat Horn - Goat
- Carrot on a Stick - Pig
- Warped Fungus on a Stick - Strider
- Brush - Armadillo
- Armor Stand - Armor Stand
- Wolf Armor - Wolf
- Seeds - Parrot
- Cod/Salmon - Cat, Ocelot
- Golden Apples/Golden Carrot - Horse, Donkey, Mule
- Pufferfish/Bucket of Pufferfish - Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus
- Eggs - Chicken
- Harnesses - Happy Ghast
- Haybale/Wool Carpets - Llama, Trader Llama
- Horse Armor - Horse, Zombie Horse
- Nautilus Armor - Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus

Tags and scoreboards can be cleaned up by running /function bellhighlight:cleanup

</details>
